title: Investigate AI-Hub Korean pet skin dataset access
description: Determine whether the AI-Hub Korean companion animal skin disease dataset can be accessed for PetCare training. Record registration requirements, license/usage restrictions, data format, classes, dog/cat split, annotations, and whether it can be mirrored or only referenced. Do not download or publish until terms are clear.

title: Acquire and normalize Mendeley dog skin disease dataset
description: Download and inspect the Hwang/Yoon Mendeley Data dog dermatology dataset identified during scouting. Verify license, RGB suitability, class counts, consent/provenance notes, and map labels to the PetCare canonical taxonomy. Output a manifest and normalized local/HF-ready layout without mixing into the frozen gold eval set.

title: Curate independent pet dermatology training data
description: Build a licensed, provenance-tracked training data expansion path that prioritizes genuinely independent sources over duplicated Kaggle/Roboflow mirrors. Scope includes Mendeley, AI-Hub access research, HF/Roboflow candidates only after license and perceptual-dedup checks, and a versioned HF dataset manifest.

title: Define confidence-calibrated abstention policy
description: Turn model confidence into safe triage behavior. Use calibration curves to choose per-class thresholds and emit the contract unknown/low-confidence path when precision is not high enough. Report precision/coverage tradeoffs per class.

title: Implement OOD and image-quality input gate
description: Reject non-dog-skin, unsupported species, blurry, dark, or otherwise low-quality inputs before forcing a disease label. Define thresholds using OOD/quality negatives from the gold set and wire results into the contract quality/OOD fields.

title: Train calibrated classifier and offline eval harness
description: Replace directional baseline-only evaluation with a reproducible offline harness: per-class recall, confusion matrix, calibration/ECE, OOD AUROC, and model card metrics against the frozen gold set. The service must keep the same inference contract.

title: Design and implement consented capture buffer plus HF sync
description: Implement the service-side half of architecture B: after inference and explicit consent, write image plus JSONL metadata to a local buffer and provide a batch sync step to a private Hugging Face dataset. Capture must be best-effort and never block triage. Outcome/correction fields start nullable until a return-flow exists.

title: Build vet-verified frozen gold evaluation set
description: Create the service-owned gold eval workflow: sourcing plan, vet labeling/adjudication, quality/OOD flags, provenance manifest, and HF versioning. Keep it frozen and never train on it. Include phone/in-the-wild style images so validation reflects real app uploads.

title: Evaluate Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis data with license and dedup
description: Assess Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis candidates only as augmentation after independent-source work. Verify license, export terms, class taxonomy, duplicate/augmentation patterns, and perceptual dedup requirements. Produce a go/no-go note and normalized mapping if usable.

title: Evaluate HF vet-derm derived dataset with dedup guardrails
description: Inspect shrayyyy/vet-derm-dataset or equivalent HF-derived veterinary dermatology data. Treat it as potentially derived from the same Roboflow/Kaggle lineage. Verify license, source lineage, label quality, and run perceptual dedup against existing training and gold-eval candidates before allowing any training use.
